rows.label: qev060101_MSG0001
rows.name:
Good grief... If you revoltant something like that,
of course you are going to collapse...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060101_MSG0002
rows.name:
And we still have so many collection stops left...
*Sigh*... What am I going to do?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060101_JNK0010
rows.name: Worry

rows.label: qev060101_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask if they are troubled by something.

rows.label: qev060101_JNK0020
rows.name: Interrogate

rows.label: qev060101_SEL0021
rows.name:
Demand to know what this suspicious
alien is doing here.

rows.label: qev060101_MSG0003
rows.name:
...Are you worrying about me?
It seems there truly are many kind Earthlings.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060101_MSG0004
rows.name:
I see you Earthlings also view us
with those kinds of eyes, after all...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060101_MSG0005
rows.name:
...The work I am undertaking right now is
important, precisely in the sense of
eliminating such prejudices.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060101_MSG0006
rows.name:
You see, we Zaruboggan have started a new initiative
regarding the Voltant in this city[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060101_MSG0007
rows.name:
It is the source of life for us, and we have
begun a business collecting it, since it is
something you all discard as unnecessary.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060101_MSG0008
rows.name:
While doing so, my friend attempted to revoltant
an object called a "hamburger" served at
that restaurant over there...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060101_MSG0009
rows.name:
And he ended up collapsing.
Good grief, dabbling in impurities other than Voltant
is the very height of foolishness...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060101_MSG0010
rows.name:
It is impossible for me to collect the massive
amounts of Voltant requested by the people
of this city all by myself...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060101_MSG0011
rows.name: I was at a complete loss for what to do...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060101_MSG0012
rows.name: …………[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060101_MSG0013
rows.name:
...That's it! If you don't mind, could you
help me gather the Voltant?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060101_MSG0014
rows.name:
With the cooperation of someone like you who has
lived in this city, I believe the collection work
would be finished in no time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060101_MSG0015
rows.name:
I beg of you. Why don't we join hands
and make this new initiative a success together?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060101_MSG0017
rows.name:
Well then, there is a doctor named Jeffrey and
a recycling operator named Graham.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060101_MSG0018
rows.name:
And also a Ma-non named Fefen.
Please go and receive the Voltant from them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060101_MSG0019
rows.name:
...Ah, right. Please be extremely careful
when handling the Voltant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060101_MSG0020
rows.name:
Just as a "hamburger" is dangerous to us,
it seems that Voltant is a highly toxic substance
to all of you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060101_JNK0030
rows.name: Thank

rows.label: qev060101_SEL0031
rows.name:
Express gratitude to the Zaruboggan
for processing harmful substances.

rows.label: qev060101_JNK0040
rows.name: Worry

rows.label: qev060101_SEL0041
rows.name:
Ask if it's safe to be carrying
such a thing around.

rows.label: qev060101_MSG0021
rows.name: No, we are the ones who should be thanking you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060101_MSG0022
rows.name:
Because if we do not receive Voltant
from all of you, we cannot continue to live...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060101_MSG0023
rows.name:
Well then, I am counting on you. Once you obtain
all three, please return to this location promptly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060101_MSG0024
rows.name:
Even if you are slightly affected by the Voltant,
I will gladly revoltant it for you.
So please, conduct the collection work with peace of mind.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060101_MSG0025
rows.name:
I am counting on you. Once you obtain
all three, please return to this location promptly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060101_MSG0026
rows.name:
It seems there is a lot of Voltant in this city
that you cannot process completely.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060101_MSG0027
rows.name:
This new initiative has drawn the interest
of many individuals.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060101_MSG0028
rows.name:
If this collection job goes well, it will likely
make even more transactions possible.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060101_MSG0029
rows.name:
Please, I am counting on you. Go and collect
the Voltant from Jeffrey, Graham, and Fefen.[ST:wait ]
